title: URL Encoding Explained: Percent-Encoding in HTTP Requests
description: Learn why special characters break URLs, how percent-encoding works at the byte level, the critical difference between encodeURI and encodeURIComponent, and common encoding bugs in real applications.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: UUIDs, NanoIDs, and CUIDs: Choosing the Right ID Format for Your Project
description: A deep dive into UUID v1, v4, and v7, NanoID, and CUID2 — what each format is, how collision probability works, and when to use which for database primary keys, URLs, and distributed systems.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: Linux File Permissions Explained: A Complete chmod Guide
description: A complete guide to Unix file permissions — the owner/group/other model, octal notation (755, 644, 777), symbolic notation, setuid/setgid/sticky bit, and real-world examples for web servers and SSH keys.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: HTTP Status Codes Every Developer Should Know
description: A practical reference for HTTP status codes — the five categories, deep dives on 200, 201, 204, 301, 302, 304, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 422, 429, 500, 502, 503, plus guidance on REST API design and debugging in DevTools.
author: BrowseryTools Team
